case_title: GOSS, ALI R. VS BALDINI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT C/O DAMON FANUCCI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,666.00 FILED BY GOSS, ALI R. AS TO DEFENDANT BALDINI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT C/O DAMON FANUCCI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1998 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BALDINI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT C/O DAMON FANUCCI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOSS, ALI R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALDINI PROPERTY MANAGEMENT C/O DAMON FANUCCI $60.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $80.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
